'''Kuan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It had a war with neighboring [[Bordal]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had to intervene by sending an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]]. An ace [[TIE pilot]], [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], was from Kuan. The planet stayed in Imperial control throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
